description_long: This object is a modular internet cafe setup featuring six individual computer workstations arranged in two rows, separated by tall partition panels for privacy. Each station is equipped with a swivel office chair, a desktop computer with dual monitors, a keyboard, and various desk accessories such as books, folders, and cups. The workstations are built into long, sturdy desks with under-desk storage units and cable management features. The partition panels are upholstered in a neutral fabric, providing both acoustic dampening and visual separation between users. The overall color palette is subdued, with black chairs, gray desks, and beige partitions, creating a professional and functional environment. The design is practical and space-efficient, suitable for high-traffic urban environments where multiple users require simultaneous computer access.
description: A modular internet cafe setup with six computer workstations, each separated by tall beige partitions and equipped with office chairs, dual monitors, and desk accessories. The arrangement is practical, professional, and space-efficient.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six workstations, each with dual monitors, chairs, and desk accessories clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall partition panels and the back of the office chairs, with limited visibility of the computer equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the workstations, monitors, and chairs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the partition panels and the arrangement of the workstations.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Six computer stations are clearly visible from the interior views, arranged in two rows of three, each with dual monitors and office chairs.
